title: Shadow's Pixels Reforged
description: A resource pack that brings a fresh and vibrant visual experience while maintaining the game’s iconic look.
body:
![RP_Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b621ce00a234a542a1309f54a0132abc0ae9903c_0.webp) _**"Once upon a time, there was a player.
The player was you"**_
Pixels Reforged is a resource pack that refreshes Minecraft's visual style while staying true to the game's original feeling. Our goal is not to change what makes Minecraft special, but to gently and carefully enhance certain visual aspects, making the whole world feel way more vibrant and immersive.

Our project is planned to be updated regularly and supported across future Minecraft versions, but now, feel free to explore the gallery to see the experience that awaits you.








**This data pack works perfectly with Vanilla Minecraft - NO EXTRA MODS REQUIRED.**





The Night of the
Living Pumpkins!
Railbalance

Potion Recipes:
Pixels Reforged Edition




If you like the content I make, don’t hesitate to join my Patreon or Ko-fi to enjoy all the exclusive members-only content, you'll get access to a lot of bonus content like WIPs, making ofs, dev. blogs and much more!







Here I leave some answers to a few possible questions you may have, I hope it can help you.
Frequently Asked Questions > **Q: Is Shadow's Pixels Reforged a Mod / Modpack / Data Pack / Plugin...?** > > A: No, Shadow's Pixels Reforged is just a resource pack and requires 0 dependencies, just Vanilla Minecraft! > **Q: Can you / Will you make a Bedrock port?** > > A: To make a version that would work on Bedrock, we would need to learn how Bedrock works. So that's not something we plan to do any time soon for now, but it will come eventually. > **Q: Do you / Will you make a Mod?** > > A: We are currently working on new and exciting mods, support us on Ko-fi or Patreon to be know all the news abt them! > **Q: What's going to happen after 1.0?** > > A: We plan to continue updating this resource pack with a lot of new features, which will be added in the 2.0 update. If you want to learn more about the upcoming content, feel free to check out this blog where we talk about everything that's coming!
> [Blog in spanish](https://ko-fi.com/post/Spanish-Planned-features-for-Pixels-Reforged-hav-D1D41FDF1B) | [Blog in english](https://ko-fi.com/post/English-Planned-features-for-Pixels-Reforged-hav-E1E21FN39I) > **Q: Can I put your Resource Pack in my Modpack?** > > A: Yes, you can do it as long as you give me credit.
